scripts.dev:web: panda --watch & PANDA_PID=$!; trap 'kill $PANDA_PID 2>/dev/null' EXIT INT TERM; vite --host 127.0.0.1 --port 1420
scripts.test:web:harness: npm run build:web && npm run test:web:harness:smoke
scripts.dev:desktop: panda --watch & PANDA_PID=$!; vite --host 127.0.0.1 --port 1420 & VITE_PID=$!; trap 'kill $PANDA_PID $VITE_PID 2>/dev/null' EXIT INT TERM; until curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:1420 >/dev/null; do kill -0 $VITE_PID 2>/dev/null || exit 1; sleep 0.2; done; PATH="/opt/homebrew/opt/zig@0.15/bin:/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:$PATH" cargo run --manifest-path apps/desktop/src-tauri/Cargo.toml
scripts.build:web: npm run panda && tsc --noEmit && vite build
scripts.build:desktop: npm run build:web && PATH="/opt/homebrew/opt/zig@0.15/bin:/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:$PATH" cargo build --release --manifest-path apps/desktop/src-tauri/Cargo.toml
scripts.check:frontend: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run build:web
scripts.check:rust: cargo test && PATH="/opt/homebrew/opt/zig@0.15/bin:/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:$PATH" cargo test --manifest-path apps/desktop/src-tauri/Cargo.toml && PATH="/opt/homebrew/opt/zig@0.15/bin:/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:$PATH" cargo check --manifest-path apps/desktop/src-tauri/Cargo.toml
scripts.check: npm run check:frontend && npm run check:rust
